race.description: Ladbrokes Pakenham Cup On Sale Hcp (Bm62)
race.comment: Tough finish. GOOD HARMONY (9) doesn't win many but is going quite well, placing in her past couple on synthetic surfaces. She just found one better last time and will take holding out here. DUNDONALD (3) showed good pace over 2100m at Ballarat Synthetic last time and defied all challengers to score by 1.75 lengths. Can roll forward again on the quick turnaround and give another bold sight. CYCLONE HARMONY (2) was just fair here last time in a BM66 and comes back a notch in grade now. He doesn't win out of turn but is largely consistent and has won here, keep safe. ITSAGIVEN (12) did a great job to score by a head over this course and distance last start in a much improved run. No reason she cannot salute again with a bit more upside.
